features.name: bardic inspiration
features.description: As a bonus action, you can grant advantage to yourself or one creature of your choice on the next ability check, attack roll, or saving throw, or you can impose disadvantage on the next attack roll made against you or that creature of your choice.

features.name: college of rhetoric
features.description: Choose one of the following colleges: College of Eloquence, College of Gloom, College of Glamour, College of Loquaciousness, College of Valor. Each college grants a unique feature at 3rd level and additional features at higher levels.

features.name: spellcasting
features.description: You know four cantrips of your choice from the bard spell list. You also know two 1st-level spells of your choice from that list, which you prepare as normal.

weapon_proficiencies: Simple weapons, hand crossbows, longswords, rapiers, shortswords

features.name: Hit Points
features.description: Hit Points at 1st Level: 8 + your Constitution modifier. Hit Points per level: d8 (or 5) + your Constitution modifier.

features.name: Proficiencies
features.description: Armor: Light Armor; Weapons: Simple weapons, hand crossbows, longswords, rapiers, shortswords; Tools: Three musical instruments of your choice; Skills: Choose three skills from the list of bard skills.

features.name: Equipment
features.description: You start with the following equipment, in addition to the equipment granted by your background: (a) a rapier, (b) longsword, or (c) any simple weapon; (a) a diplomatic pouch or an entertainer's pack; (a) lute or another musical instrument; a leather armor and a dagger.
